debug_info.goal:
f : NNReal → ENNReal
a : NNReal
⊢ ∫⁻ (t : NNReal) in Set.Ici a, f t = ∫⁻ (t : NNReal), f (t + a)

failed_attempts:
apply lintegral_congr_fun
  filter_upwards with x
  rw [Set.indicator_apply, Set.indicator_apply, Set.indicator_apply]
  simp only [Set.mem_Ici, Real.toNNReal_coe]
  by_cases hx : 0 ≤ x
  · have ha : 0 ≤ (a : ℝ) := a.2
    simp [hx, le_add_of_nonneg_left hx, Real.toNNReal_add hx ha]
  · have : ¬ a ≤ x + a := fun h ↦ hx (by linarith [h, a.2])
